Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM CRM_COM WHERE CRM_COM_ID = @CRM_COM_ID AND SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID

Set.Name: OnPagePost SQL
Set.Sql: UPDATE CRM_COM SET CRM_COM_NOTE = @CRM_COM_NOTE, ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID, CITY_ID1 = @CITY_ID1 WHERE CRM_COM_ID = @CRM_COM_ID AND SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID

Set.Name: CheckError SQL
Set.Sql: -- select 不能执行 as EWA_ERR_OUT FROM xxx where 1=2

Set.Name: loadCity sql
Set.Sql: SELECT CITY_ID, CITY_NAME, CITY_NAME_EN FROM CITY WHERE CITY_PID = @PROVINCE_ID order by CITY_NAME

Set.SearchSql: SELECT ADM_ID, ADM_NAME, ADM_NAME_EN FROM ADM_USER WHERE ADM_USR_STA_TAG='OK' and sup_id=@g_sup_id and pid is null ORDER BY ADM_USR_STA_TAG

Set.Sql: SELECT ADM_ID, ADM_NAME, ADM_NAME_EN , left(ltrim(dbo.f_getpy(adm_name)),1) as PY FROM ADM_USER WHERE ADM_USR_STA_TAG = 'OK' AND sup_id = @g_sup_id AND pid IS NULL and adm_dep_id >0 ORDER BY adm_name

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM CRM_COM cm left join (select top 1 CRM_COM_ID,CRM_CUS_NAME ,CRM_CUS_TITLE ,CRM_CUS_SEX ,CRM_CUS_EMAIL ,CRM_CUS_TELE ,CRM_CUS_MOBILE ,CRM_CUS_ADDR ,CRM_CUS_JOB ,CRM_CUS_HOBBY ,CRM_CUS_CDATE ,CRM_CUS_MDATE ,CRM_CUS_LDATE ,CRM_CUS_CNUM ,CRM_CUS_NOTE ,CRM_CUS_TAG ,CRM_CUS_MASTER from CRM_CUS where CRM_CUS_MASTER='COM_YES') cs on cm.CRM_COM_ID=cs.CRM_COM_ID WHERE CRM_COM_ID = @CRM_COM_ID

Set.Name: OnNew SQL

Set.Sql: select bas_tag a,bas_tag_name b from BAS_TAG where bas_tag_grp='SEX' order by BAS_TAG_ORD
select bas_tag a,bas_tag_name b from BAS_TAG where bas_tag_grp='CRM_COM_SI' order by BAS_TAG_ORD
select bas_tag a,bas_tag_name b from BAS_TAG where bas_tag_grp='CRM_IND' order by BAS_TAG_ORD

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN BAS_TAG_NAME IS NULL THEN '发展中'ELSE '已签约' END AS TAG , DEP_NAME , CRM_CONN_TAG , V.* , isnull(cc.sup_down_id,0) r_sup_id , CASE WHEN SUP_DOWN_ID IS NULL THEN 'SIGN_NO' ELSE 'SIGN_YES' END SIGN , FAV.FAV_ID , INCOME.* , CASE WHEN BILL_PEOPLE_NUM =0 THEN NULL ELSE BILL_RECEIVED / BILL_PEOPLE_NUM END AS UNIT_PRICE , A0.ADM_NAME FROM CRM_COM V LEFT JOIN CRM_CONN CC ON V.CRM_COM_ID = CC.CRM_COM_ID LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG B1 ON B1.BAS_TAG = CRM_CONN_TAG LEFT JOIN ADM_USER A0 ON V.ADM_ID = A0.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN ADM_DEPT A1 ON A1.DEP_ID = A0.ADM_DEP_ID LEFT JOIN WEB_FAV_MAIN FAV ON V.CRM_COM_ID = FAV.REF_ID AND FAV.REF_TAG = 'CRM_COM' -- 我的关注 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT RELATE_SUP_ID , SUM(BILL_RECEIVED) BILL_RECEIVED , SUM(BILL_PEOPLE_NUM) BILL_PEOPLE_NUM FROM GRP_BILL GROUP BY RELATE_SUP_ID ) INCOME ON CC.SUP_DOWN_ID = INCOME.RELATE_SUP_ID WHERE V.SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID AND ( V.ADM_ID=@G_ADM_ID OR (@TEAM=1 AND v.ADM_ID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT)) OR (@TEAM=2 AND A0.ADM_DEP_ID=@TARGET_DEP_ID) ) AND USE_STATE<>'DEL' and (@CRM_COM_ID is null or v.CRM_COM_ID=@CRM_COM_ID) ) AS TE WHERE 1=1 AND ( (@TAGA='QY' AND NOT CRM_CONN_TAG IS NULL) OR (@TAGA='QZ' AND CRM_CONN_TAG IS NULL) OR (@TAGA='UNIVERSITY' AND CRM_COM_CAL_TAG ='CRM_IND_UNIVERSITY') OR @TAGA IS NULL ) order by FAV_ID desc, CRM_COM_ID desc

Set.Name: OnFrameDelete SQL
Set.Sql: UPDATE CRM_COM SET USE_STATE='DEL' WHERE CRM_COM_ID = @CRM_COM_ID

Set.Name: ExtendAction0 SQL
Set.Sql: -- enter your sql

Set.Name: ExtendAction1 SQL
Set.Sql: -- enter your sql

Set.Name: ExtendAction2 SQL
Set.Sql: -- enter your sql

Set.SearchSql: select CASE WHEN BAS_TAG='YES' THEN '已签约' WHEN BAS_TAG='NO' THEN '发展中' END AS A , CASE WHEN BAS_TAG='YES' THEN '已签约' WHEN BAS_TAG='NO' THEN '发展中' END AS B from bas_tag where bas_tag_grp='Y_N'

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM CRM_COM WHERE CRM_COM_ID = @CRM_COM_ID AND SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID

Set.Name: OnPagePost SQL
Set.Sql: UPDATE CRM_COM SET CRM_COM_NOTE = @CRM_COM_NOTE, ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID, CITY_ID1 = @CITY_ID1 WHERE CRM_COM_ID = @CRM_COM_ID AND SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID

Set.Name: CheckError SQL
Set.Sql: -- select 不能执行 as EWA_ERR_OUT FROM xxx where 1=2

Set.Name: loadCity sql
Set.Sql: SELECT CITY_ID, CITY_NAME, CITY_NAME_EN FROM CITY WHERE CITY_PID = @PROVINCE_ID order by CITY_NAME

Set.SearchSql: SELECT BAS_TAG, BAS_TAG_NAME, BAS_TAG_NAME_EN FROM BAS_TAG WHERE BAS_TAG_GRP = 'CUSTOMER_SOURCE' ORDER BY BAS_TAG_ORD

Set.Sql: SELECT BAS_TAG, BAS_TAG_NAME, BAS_TAG_NAME_EN FROM BAS_TAG WHERE BAS_TAG_GRP = 'CUSTOMER_SOURCE' ORDER BY BAS_TAG_ORD

Set.SearchSql: SELECT ADM_ID, ADM_NAME, ADM_NAME_EN FROM ADM_USER WHERE ADM_USR_STA_TAG='OK' and sup_id=@g_sup_id and pid is null ORDER BY ADM_USR_STA_TAG

Set.Sql: SELECT ADM_ID, ADM_NAME, ADM_NAME_EN , left(ltrim(dbo.f_getpy(adm_name)),1) as PY FROM ADM_USER WHERE ADM_USR_STA_TAG = 'OK' AND sup_id = @g_sup_id AND pid IS NULL and adm_dep_id >0 ORDER BY adm_name

Set.SearchSql: SELECT CITY_ID, CITY_NAME, CITY_NAME_EN FROM CITY WHERE COUNTRY_ID=@COUNTRY_ID ORDER BY CITY_NAME

Set.Sql: SELECT CITY_PSOT_CODE,CITY_NAME FROM CITY WHERE COUNTRY_ID=52 AND CITY_LVL_NEW=3 AND CITY_STATUS='USED' AND CITY_PSOT_CODE>0
